# CPPDubovSystem (WASM Build)

This directory contains the WebAssembly (WASM) compilation of the [CPPDubovSystem](https://github.com/MichaelVShapiro/CPPDubovSystem) library, a C++ FIDE Dubov System pairing engine.

## Files in this Directory

- `dubov.wasm`: The compiled WebAssembly binary containing the C++ library logic.
- `dubov.js`: The JavaScript glue code generated by Emscripten to load and bridge the WASM module.
- `bindings.cpp`: The custom Emscripten bindings used to expose the `Tournament` and `Player` C++ classes to JavaScript.
- `LICENSE`: A copy of the original Apache License, Version 2.0.
- `THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.txt`: Legal attribution and modification notices required for distribution.

## Compilation

This build was compiled using [Emscripten](https://emscripten.org/) (`em++`). The standalone CLI files (`main.cpp`, `fpc.cpp`, `csv.cpp`) were specifically excluded to create a pure library module.

**Build Command:**

```bash
em++ -O3 -std=c++20 .\external\DubovSystem\Tournament.cpp .\external\DubovSystem\Player.cpp .\external\DubovSystem\explain.cpp .\external\DubovSystem\baku.cpp .\external\DubovSystem\LinkedList.cpp ".\external\DubovSystem\graph util\Graph.cpp" ".\external\DubovSystem\graph util\Matching.cpp" ".\external\DubovSystem\graph util\BinaryHeap.cpp" ".\external\DubovSystem\trf util\trf.cpp" ".\external\DubovSystem\trf util\rtg.cpp" .\bindings.cpp -I.\external\DubovSystem "-I.\external\DubovSystem\graph util" "-I.\external\DubovSystem\trf util" --bind -s WASM=1 -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORT_NAME="'DubovSystem'" -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -o dubov.js
```
